CustomField.label: NEPA Discipline
CustomField.description: Specialist discipline copied from NEPA_Layer_Discipline__mdt.Discipline__c at Work Order creation. Denormalized for direct filtering and reporting without traversing custom metadata. Also used by NEPA_WO_Milestone_Setter to look up the correct discipline-specific Action Plan Template. Example values: Hydrologist, Wildlife Biologist (Sage-Grouse), Geologist, Botanist.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: The specialist discipline this Work Order requires (e.g., Hydrologist, Geologist). Set automatically when Work Order is auto-generated from GIS detection.
